zh.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Hywel於大約1115年出生在威爾士。她於1132年與Maredudd Ap Iorwerth在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Hywel was born about 1115, in Wales. She married Maredudd Ap Iorwerth in 1132, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 4 daughters.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Hywelは約1115年にウェールズで生まれた。1132年にイギリスウェールズでMaredudd Ap Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Hywel(은)는 대략 1115년 웨일스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1132년 영국 웨일스에서 Maredudd Ap Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Hywel родилась около 1115 г. в местности Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maredudd Ap Iorwerth в 1132 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 4 дочери.
